Assignment: Evidence Operations Lead for a proof-first pilot corridor

Evidence Operations Lead for a proof-first pilot corridor

Invited address

Apply
Role and focus

Why this role exists

Reduce noisy candidate screening by reviewing one role-specific proof pack before any identity reveal or broad portfolio exposure.

Work summary

Lead a compact proof review lane for a privacy-sensitive hiring pilot, turning raw project evidence, reviewer notes, and operational constraints into a calm assignment packet the organization can inspect without seeing identity-bearing details too early.

Proof expectations

Submit one owner-only proof pack showing real work, your part in the outcome, constraints, and what can be checked without contacting third parties.

Relevant signals

Evidence review
Privacy operations
Stakeholder synthesis
Workflow design
Practical constraints
Engagement
Contract / consulting
Location / work mode
Hybrid / Stockholm, Sweden
Time commitment
12-20 hours/week
Start window
6/1/2026 - 6/15/2026
Compensation
SEK 650-950
Review process

The organization reviews proof and outcomes first. Your direct identity, contact information, and direct portfolio link stay hidden until a later reveal step that requires your approval.

Verification checks

Identity check
Work email check
Apply from this assignment

Continue when the assignment context is clear. The next step keeps the application tied to this role and asks for proof only after this context.

Create or choose one owner-only Proof Pack for this assignment. The submission does not publish a public page or broaden the application beyond this assignment.
